hints.question: How do I get the three radii from `size`?
How do I work out where the body should sit?
hints.answer: Two circles touch when the distance between their centers equals the sum of their radii. So `bodyY = headY + headRadius + bodyRadius`.

hints.question: How do I position the base in the same way?
hints.answer: Use the same idea relative to the body: `baseY = bodyY + bodyRadius + baseRadius`.

hints.question: Why can't I just hardcode the y positions?
hints.answer: The whole point is that changing `size` should scale the snowman. If you hardcode numbers, changing `size` would leave the circles overlapping or gapped.
